parsed_review.summary: CP00-196 is a correctly-bounded descriptor-only Risk A review-question security gate covering exactly the 10 planned units RP05.P09.M07.S03-S12 (security_audit 2, test 1, ui 1, implementation 6; micro-title "Test And Golden Case Set" x10). The pack-level production_ready claim is NOT overstated: manifest.json carries status=in_progress and production_ready=false, and the Hermes packet exposes only production_ready_candidate (= coverage.valid && gate.valid), not a closed production/enterprise-trust claim. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are sound and enforced: the contract no_write_attestation and registry MATTER_CORE_CP196_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION hold every write/permission/audit/route/DOM/API/loop/citation field false with synthetic_only=true and no_real_client_data=true, validateMatterCoreCp196ReviewQuestionSecurityGate asserts all of these plus the 11 leak guards (no_permission_decision_detail, no_audit_event_body, no_audit_event_write, no_unauthorized_count, no_route_dispatch, replay_commands_inert, etc.), and the security/audit rows S03/S04 remain outcome=blocked with opaque *_ref strings only. CP178+ review hardening is satisfied: the auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1449-byte stdout, well-formed JSON {"ok":true}), and forbidden_review_evidence (auth_failure, stdout_0_bytes, malformed_json, fenced_json_plus_prose, tool_call_shaped_output, claude_final_approval_claim, source_mutation_claim, production_or_enterprise_trust_claim, ...) is enumerated in the contract and bound into the Claude packet as invalid_review_blockers. The authority boundary is preserved: the Claude packet is read_only=true with allowed_tools [Read,Grep,Glob], claude_is_final_approval=false / promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, and enterprise_trust_claim_from_local_validation=false; human final approval remains required. Hermes control-plane patterns appear only in the deterministic review evidence packet/receipt path (hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false), not in product runtime. Tests in packages/matter/test/model.test.js assert the descriptor-only row counts, leak guards, authority booleans, and packet identities. One P3 (informational) finding: of the five required_pack_artifacts only manifest.json physically exists; the remaining four are produced by later steps of the 8-step hardened_sequence (this review is the read_only_claude_raw_capture step) and final closeout stays gated on human approval. No P0/P1/P2 issues; nothing blocks pack or goal closeout at this review stage.

findings.title: Downstream hardened-sequence pack artifacts pending by design; final closeout remains gated on human approval
findings.details: manifest.required_pack_artifacts lists five files (manifest.json, command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json), but a Glob of docs/closeout-packs/cp00-196/** confirms only manifest.json currently exists. This is expected and consistent with the pack's own state rather than a defect: manifest.status=in_progress, production_ready=false, and pack_level_claude_review.status=pending_hardened_review with hardened_sequence=[baseline, readiness, read_only_claude_raw_capture, normalize, receipt_validate, adjudication, construction_inspection, final_closeout_validation]. The present review is the read_only_claude_raw_capture step, so command-evidence.json (command runs), claude-review-result.json (normalized result), adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json are generated by later steps. No production or enterprise-trust claim is asserted from local validation (contract enterprise_trust_claim_from_local_validation=false; no_write_attestation.claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false), and Claude is not the final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false / promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false).
findings.recommendation: At the final_closeout_validation step, regenerate and validate all five required_pack_artifacts (and run the 11 expected validation commands incl. npm run rp05:matter-core:validate, npm test, npm run goal:closeout:validate, git diff --check). Do not flip manifest.production_ready to true or assert any enterprise-trust claim on the basis of this read-only Claude review; require documented human final approval (per the S12 human_approval_summary / MATTER_CORE_HUMAN_APPROVAL_REQUIRED gate) before closeout.
findings.post_review_disposition: Informational only; no code or contract change required at this review stage. Tracked as the expected remaining work for the final_closeout_validation step and the human approval gate before CP00-196 pack closeout and handoff to CP00-197 / RP05.P09.M07.S13.
